asset allocation of flexi cap fund:
The Parag Parikh Flexi Cap Fund invests a minimum of 65% in Indian equities and up to 35% in overseas equity securities and domestic debt/money market securities. It has an open-ended dynamic equity scheme investing across large cap, mid cap, and small cap stocks. The fund's investment approach focuses on management quality, business quality, and company valuation.

Sources:
https://amc.ppfas.com/downloads/factsheet/2026/flexi-cap-fund.pdf
https://amc.ppfas.com/downloads/factsheet/2026/ppfas-mf-factsheet-for-January-2026.pdf
Last updated from sources: February 2026

what is lock in period?:
The Parag Parikh ELSS Tax Saver Fund has a statutory lock-in period of 3 years. This is an open-ended equity linked savings scheme. It also offers a tax benefit.

annual return of flexi cap fund:
The annual return for the Parag Parikh Flexi Cap Fund (PPFCF) Regular plan was 6.28%, and the Direct plan was 6.98% for the period of Jan 31, 2025 - Jan 30, 2026. Benchmark indices, NIFTY 500 and NIFTY 50, had annual returns of 8.00% and 9.00% respectively for the same period. The scheme's annualised returns are also listed as 18.04% and 18.94% across different categories on January 31, 2026.

https://amc.ppfas.com/downloads/factsheet/2026/flexi-cap-fund.pdf
